instructions.title: Risk Management Framework for DoD Systems
instructions.description: Establishes the RMF as the unified cybersecurity framework for all DoD IT, replacing DIACAP. Defines the six-step process for authorizing systems to operate.
instructions.applicability: All DoD information systems and platform IT

controlMappings.guidance: Implement organizational security assessment and authorization policies per DoDI 8510.01.
Conduct security control assessments using NIST SP 800-53A assessment procedures.
Obtain ATO from the designated Authorizing Official before system operation.
Develop and maintain a System Security Plan (SSP) documenting all security controls.

instructions.title: Cybersecurity
instructions.description: Establishes cybersecurity policy and assigns responsibilities to protect DoD information and IT. Defines the overall cybersecurity program framework.

controlMappings.guidance: Establish and maintain an organization-wide information security program per DoDI 8500.01.
Implement mandatory cybersecurity awareness training for all personnel.
Establish incident response capabilities and reporting procedures.

instructions.title: Ports, Protocols, and Services Management
instructions.description: Establishes policy for the management and approval of ports, protocols, and services (PPS) within the DoD Global Information Grid (GIG).
instructions.applicability: All DoD information systems connected to the DODIN

controlMappings.guidance: Register all ports, protocols, and services with the DoD PPS CAL.
Disable unnecessary ports, protocols, and services per PPS guidance.
Enforce approved information flow policies at system boundaries.

instructions.title: Public Key Infrastructure and Public Key Enabling
instructions.description: Establishes policy and assigns responsibilities for DoD PKI and PK-enabling of IT systems. Requires CAC-based authentication for all DoD systems.
instructions.applicability: All DoD information systems requiring authentication

controlMappings.guidance: Implement CAC/PKI-based multi-factor authentication per DoD PKI policy.
Use DoD PKI for all cryptographic key establishment and management.

instructions.title: Cybersecurity Activities Support to DoD Information Network Operations
instructions.description: Assigns responsibilities for cybersecurity activities supporting DODIN operations, including vulnerability management and incident response.
instructions.applicability: All DoD components connected to DODIN

controlMappings.guidance: Report and handle cybersecurity incidents per CJCSM 6510.01B.
Conduct ACAS vulnerability scanning per IAVM compliance requirements.
Implement HBSS and network monitoring capabilities.

instructions.title: Security Categorization and Control Selection for NSS
instructions.description: Provides security categorization guidance and control selection for National Security Systems (NSS), augmenting FIPS 199 and NIST SP 800-53.

controlMappings.guidance: Apply CNSSI 1253 categorization methodology for NSS using CIA impact levels.
Document NSS-specific control selections and rationale per CNSSI 1253.
